claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, security-completeness, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: named region, ordered comment articles and native reply form
semantics.rolePolicy: Submission errors are alerts; pending optimistic comments use aria-busy and visible status.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through resolve, comment actions, reply, mention, retry and discard controls.
Activates focused buttons; textarea Enter remains multiline.

nonColor: Open, resolved, pending, failed and recovery states are visible text and native state, not color alone.
responsive: Comments and long localized text wrap; actions wrap and coarse-pointer controls use preferred targets.
mutationPolicy: The consumer owns persistence and authorization. Optimistic mode keeps failed text locally with explicit Retry and Discard and does not invent server success.
consumerResponsibilities: Authorize resolve, reopen, reply, edit and delete operations at the server.
Sanitize any rich comment renderer and mention metadata.
Replace deterministic local optimistic ids with server identities.
Localize timestamps, actions, errors and mention labels.
